title: Leather Craft
description: You can create leather by smelting rotten flesh with this mod!
body:
# Leather Craft

**Leather Craft** is a simple but essential utility mod for Minecraft that allows you to convert **Rotten Flesh** into **Leather** by cooking it. No more throwing away potential resources!

![Leather Craft Logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/yigit-guven/Leather-Craft/refs/heads/1.21.x-NeoForge/src/main/resources/META-INF/logo.png)

## 🔥 Features
- **Furnace**: Cook Rotten Flesh into Leather.
- **Smoker**: Cook Rotten Flesh into Leather (Faster!).
- **Campfire**: Cook Rotten Flesh into Leather (Slow but cozy).

## 📥 Download
- [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/leather-craft)
- [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/leather-craft)
- [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/yigit-guven/Leather-Craft/releases)

## 🔗 Links
- [Source Code](https://github.com/yigit-guven/Leather-Craft)

- [My Website](https://yigitguven.net/)
- [My GitHub Profile](https://github.com/yigit-guven)

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Install modloader for Minecraft.
2. Download the latest `leathercraft-x.x.x-modloader-x.x.x.jar`.
3. Place the jar file in your `mods` folder.
4. Enjoy!
